message: Fix AI ferry movement, batch enumeration crash, and cash drain
Add Brutal AI network-aware scoring, fix upgrade payout bug and ferry city entry cost
Fix AI building on foreign track: detect, skip, and reroute around opponent rails
Fix Brutal AI WebSocket crash: add time limit to triple batch enumeration
Replace capacity abandon with smart drop: AI drops irrelevant goods at pickup
Fix AI capacity overflow loop: abandon plan when train is full at pickup
Fix AI ferry oscillation and update affordability reserve test
Add Brutal AI with 3-delivery batches, Superfreight upgrades, and fix AI stuck loops
Rewrite easy AI to inherit from hard AI (singles only, no batches)
Fix AI frontier movement and batch build delivery gating
Polish game prep room UI and fix hard AI plan execution bugs
Fix hard AI diamond track and batch delivery card index bugs
Add borrowing feature: borrow up to 20M from bank, repay double from deliveries
Add train type to player cards and rename Major Cities to Cities
Add discard pile reshuffle and overhaul demand card hover effect
Update gale event descriptions to list all effects
Add ferry section to How to Play tutorial
Add turn duration clock to train card
UI fixes, terrain balance, and demand card improvements
Add configurable train speed tiers (Standard/Faster/Fastest)
